# [[Defaults]]
set(THIRDPARTY_SDLMIXER_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS ${BUILD_SHARED_LIBS})

set(SDL2MIXER_DEPS_SHARED ${THIRDPARTY_SDLMIXER_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS} CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)

set(SDL2MIXER_FLAC OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_GME OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_MOD OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_MP3 ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_MIDI OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_OPUS ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_WAVE ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)

set(SDL2MIXER_FLAC_LIBFLAC_SHARED ${THIRDPARTY_SDLMIXER_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS} CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_GME_SHARED ${THIRDPARTY_SDLMIXER_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS} CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_MOD_XMP_SHARED ${THIRDPARTY_SDLMIXER_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS} CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_MP3_MPG123_SHARED ${THIRDPARTY_SDLMIXER_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS} CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_MIDI_FLUIDSYNTH_SHARED ${THIRDPARTY_SDLMIXER_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS} CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_OPUS_SHARED ${THIRDPARTY_SDLMIXER_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS} CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SDL2MIXER_WAVPACK_SHARED ${THIRDPARTY_SDLMIXER_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS} CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)


# [[Subdirectories]]
add_subdirectory("SDL2_mixer" EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)


# [[Binaries]]
eightgine_add_module(MODULE_NAME "SDL2_mixer"
    MODULE_INCLUDE_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/SDL2_mixer/include"
    MODULE_TYPE INTERFACE
)


# [[Dependencies]]
eightgine_link_dependency(MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_NAME "SDL2_mixer" DEPENDENCY_NAME "SDL2_mixer")
